answer: WooCommerce is free, open-source software and does not charge for API access or use platform-based pricing tiers for its core features [1]. Developers can generate API keys directly within the WordPress admin dashboard under WooCommerce, Settings, Advanced, REST API [2]. While the platform is free, recent updates have moved some headless-specific integration tools into premium third-party packages, leading to additional costs for complex headless architectures [3][4]. Two primary APIs are available: the authenticated REST API (v3) for full management of store data [2][5], and the unauthenticated Store API (v1) for customer-facing frontend features [6].
